user.title: Configure Solar EV Manager
user.description: Select the correct entities from your Home Assistant system to enable dynamic solar charging.

data_description.grid_sensor: Must read Negative (-) when exporting to the grid, and Positive (+) when importing (e.g., Shelly EM Main Clamp).
data_description.ev_sensor: The sensor measuring the live Wattage of your EV charger circuit.
data_description.voltage_sensor: The sensor measuring your live house voltage (Volts).
data_description.octopus_switch: The master Smart Charge switch provided by the Octopus Energy integration.
data_description.tesla_switch: The switch that starts and stops the charging session.
data_description.tesla_amps: The number slider that controls the charging limit (typically 5A to 32A).
data_description.tesla_cable: The sensor that reports if the car is plugged in (Must report 'Disconnected' when unplugged).
